rationale: The Executor's escalation is type 'blocked' due to a missing credential: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is absent from .env.test and has no entry in the 1Password 'shared-eng' vault (where Braintree equivalents live). This is an external credential that was never provisioned for this development environment — it cannot be resolved by the Architect through a directive or plan amendment. The code and unit tests (with mocked signature) are complete; only the end-to-end integration test is blocked. Resolution requires a human operator to either provision the test-mode webhook secret from Stripe Dashboard > Developers > Webhooks or confirm that mocked unit test coverage satisfies the acceptance criteria.
